title: design: conditional filter building omits null fields safely
description: message_query (lines 62-82 in methods/message.rs) builds a filter map conditionally, inserting only keys with Some values. When empty, it sends filter:null instead of filter:{}. This is safer than sending explicit nulls because: (1) JMAP spec allows filter:null (means 'no filter'), (2) some servers reject unknown null fields, (3) matches the pattern used in custom_emoji_query (which deliberately omits filter when not set). The test body matcher (Test 35, lines 1373-1384) validates that both presence and absence are correct.
close_reason: Design decision: good design, no action needed
